prompt: A close-up upper-body portrait of a cute Japanese idol-style girl in an ultra-kawaii pastel bedroom, centered in frame, with her face hidden by a large solid rectangular censor block in a muted mauve-brown color. She has dark brown medium-length wavy hair in twin tails, decorated with 2 oversized translucent pink bows, pearl strands, ribbon streamers, and 2 dangling star charms. Her outfit is an extravagant yume-kawaii idol dress in shimmering {argument name="main colors" default="pink and lavender"}, with glossy satin fabric, lace trim, frilly off-shoulder sleeves, sheer ruffles, beadwork, tiny gem details, and a large jeweled heart brooch at the center of the chest. Include a lace camisole neckline underneath, a sparkly collar with tiny pastel charms, a ribbon bow near one curl that she gently holds with one hand, and matching frilled wrist cuffs. The background is a dreamy, heavily decorated kawaii room filled with soft fairy lights, pastel curtains, ribbons, bows, plush textures, and glowing decor. On the left side, add a pink neon heart sign with a bow outline containing the Japanese text {argument name="neon sign text" default="夢は叶えるもの"}. Use a soft-focus lens, glittery highlights, pearlescent textures, warm pink-purple ambient lighting, bokeh sparkles, and a vertical social-media photo composition. The overall mood is sweet, magical, idol-core, feminine, and hyper-detailed, like a pastel fashion photo taken in a decorated kawaii studio.
translatedPrompt: 一张可爱的日系偶像风格女孩半身特写肖像，背景为超卡哇伊的马卡龙色卧室，构图居中。她的脸部被一个哑光灰褐色的大型实心矩形遮挡块遮住。她留着深棕色中长波浪双马尾，装饰着 2 个超大透明粉色蝴蝶结、珍珠串、丝带飘带和 2 个垂坠的星星挂饰。她身穿华丽的梦幻卡哇伊（yume-kawaii）偶像礼服，主色调为 {argument name="main colors" default="粉色和薰衣草色"}，采用光泽缎面、蕾丝花边、荷叶边露肩袖、透明褶边、串珠工艺、细小宝石细节，胸前饰有一个巨大的珠宝心形胸针。内搭蕾丝吊带领口，佩戴带有细小马卡龙色挂饰的闪亮项圈，其中一缕卷发旁系着丝带蝴蝶结，她用一只手轻轻托住，并配有相称的荷叶边腕带。背景是一个梦幻且装饰繁复的卡哇伊房间，充满柔和的仙女灯、马卡龙色窗帘、丝带、蝴蝶结、毛绒质感和发光装饰。在左侧，添加一个带有蝴蝶结轮廓的粉色霓虹心形标志，其中包含日文文本 {argument name="neon sign text" default="夢は叶えるもの"}。使用柔焦镜头、闪光高光、珠光质感、暖粉紫色环境光、焦外成像光斑，以及垂直社交媒体照片构图。整体氛围甜美、梦幻、偶像核心、女性化且细节丰富，宛如在装饰精美的卡哇伊摄影棚中拍摄的马卡龙色时尚大片。

breakdown.creativeCore: 霓虹心形装饰的马卡龙色系偶像肖像：此提示词可生成梦幻般的卡哇伊偶像风格肖像照，采用精致的马卡龙色系时尚造型，非常适合社交媒体视觉图、审美品牌推广或角色灵感时尚艺术创作。
breakdown.subject: 服饰
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, close-up, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: neon, lens]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
